name: @speedora/seo-copy
description: Stateless module (JSON-in/JSON-out): Publishing Expansion Phase 7B (AI SEO - per-platform LLM-generated copy). A brand-new, standalone LLM call producing a platform-specific caption/hashtags/description for one clip+platform, from already-computed Clip fields (hookText/topics/keywords/ctaText/reason) - never re-sends the transcript, never reads/writes Clip.scores/viralityScore/highlightScore or the frozen detect-clips prompt. No DB/queue access at all; see root ARCHITECTURE.md. Consumed by apps/worker's generate-platform-copy adapter.
